# example-python-pipenv

Example Python Pipenv project for README Auto Scan.

## Features

- Python project with Pipenv package management
- Clean, professional markdown formatting

## Installation

Install dependencies:

```bash
pipenv install
```

## Usage

Run the project:

```bash
pipenv run python main.py
```

## Testing

Run tests:

```bash
pipenv run pytest
```

## Dependencies

| Package | Version |
| ------- | ------- |
| requests | * |
| pytest | * |

## Development

```bash
# Install dependencies
pipenv install

# Run the project
pipenv run python main.py

# Run tests
pipenv run pytest
```
